summary: Added a generated-art Path Memory Codex to every lane Trail view so lane history reads as a filterable game archive with lenses for gates, proof, wins, tasks, traces, future sockets, raw-trail expansion, and Path Map proof/replay drilldown.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium dark sci-fi path memory archive with central codex engine, branching timeline shelves, event tablets, proof crystals, blocker locks, task cards, trace ribbons, outcome medals, future sockets, teal/green/amber/coral/violet accents, no readable text, no logos, no faces.

ui_contract: Render a generated-art Path Memory Codex at the top of every lane Trail view.
Derive memory records from existing lane trail/milestone data without adding snapshot schema.
Expose All, Gates, Proof, Wins, Tasks, and Traces lenses with per-lane state.
Let each memory card jump into the existing Path Map event focus and Route Replay state.
Expose PATH, COM, and MORE actions for deeper lane navigation and raw-trail expansion.
Render future sockets for older records, blocker review, proof packets, and unlock rewards.
Register path-memory-codex-20260618.png in the Visual Asset Vault.
Keep motion transform/opacity-based and covered by reduced-motion handling.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_memory_codex.py -q should fail before implementation on missing Path Memory Codex wiring.
red_green.green: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_memory_codex.py -q passed after generated asset, Trail renderer, local lenses, handlers, docs, CSS fallback, Asset Vault registration, and responsive overflow fix.

evidence.proof_lens_result: Proof lens rendered one proof card with zero codex overflow.
evidence.more_action_result: MORE expanded raw Trail records from 18 to 36 while staying on the Trail tab.

responsive.evidence: All checked viewports rendered the Path Memory Codex with generated art loaded at 1536x1024 natural size, five stats, six lenses, ten memory cards, four future sockets, zero codex button overflow, zero codex escaped rects, zero panel overflow, zero page horizontal overflow, and zero console errors. The previous 1600x1000 split-column overflow was fixed by making the codex container-safe with single-column default layout and auto-fit inner grids.
